title: gentiana aspera subsp. sturmiana
intro: Gentiana aspera subsp. sturmiana, also known as Sturm's gentian or Sturm's rough gentian, is a subspecies of the Gentiana aspera plant, a type of flowering plant belonging to the gentian family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestion, relieve indigestion and nausea, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Gentiana aspera subsp. sturmiana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce swelling, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Gentiana aspera subsp. sturmiana is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in the production of traditional herbal remedies, such as bitter tonics and digestive supplements.
